title: Salty Almond Soup
description: A savory chinese soup made with salty flavors and crunchy almonds. This soup is easy to make and perfect for a quick lunch.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped scallions and cook until they are soft and fragrant.
Pour in the soup broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and let it simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the almonds and cook for another 5 minutes.
Season the soup with soy sauce and salt to taste.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with chopped scallions if desired.
Prepare the almond topping by blending the almonds into a crunchy topping.
Sprinkle the almond topping over the soup before serving.
Garnish with scallions and serve immediately.
